allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const wf=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('workflows/foronum_news_pipeline.json','utf-8'\)\);console.log\('Valid JSON, Nodes:',wf.nodes.length\);let issues=[];for\(const n of wf.nodes\){if\(n.credentials\){for\(const[t,d]of Object.entries\(n.credentials\)\){if\(d.id\)issues.push\(n.name+' has id '+d.id\)}}}console.log\('Credential issues:',issues.length?issues.join\('; '\):'none'\);const names=new Set\(wf.nodes.map\(n=>n.name\)\);for\(const[s,c]of Object.entries\(wf.connections\)\){if\(!names.has\(s\)\)issues.push\('bad src:'+s\);for\(const o of c.main||[]\){for\(const cn of o\){if\(!names.has\(cn.node\)\)issues.push\('bad dst:'+cn.node\)}}}console.log\('Connection issues:',issues.length?issues.join\('; '\):'none'\)")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\);var p=require\('path'\);var h=require\('os'\).homedir\(\);var d=fs.readFileSync\(p.join\(h,'n8n_nodes.json'\),'utf-8'\).trim\(\);var nodes=JSON.parse\(d\);var mc={mySql:{id:'ayDTnm75zHVOkDH0',name:'foronum_n8n'}};var f=0;for\(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++\){if\(nodes[i].type==='n8n-nodes-base.mySql'&&!nodes[i].credentials\){nodes[i].credentials=JSON.parse\(JSON.stringify\(mc\)\);f++}}fs.writeFileSync\(p.join\(h,'n8n_nodes_fixed.json'\),JSON.stringify\(nodes\),'utf-8'\);process.stdout.write\('Fixed '+f+' nodes\\n'\)")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\);var p=require\('path'\);var h=require\('os'\).homedir\(\);var d=fs.readFileSync\(p.join\(h,'n8n_nodes_fixed.json'\),'utf-8'\).trim\(\);var nodes=JSON.parse\(d\);var email=nodes.find\(function\(n\){return n.type==='n8n-nodes-base.emailSend'}\);if\(email\){process.stdout.write\('Send Email node found, credentials: '+JSON.stringify\(email.credentials\)+'\\n'\)}else{process.stdout.write\('No email node\\n'\)}")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\);var p=require\('path'\);var h=require\('os'\).homedir\(\);var d=fs.readFileSync\(p.join\(h,'n8n_nodes_fixed.json'\),'utf-8'\).trim\(\);var nodes=JSON.parse\(d\);for\(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++\){if\(nodes[i].type==='n8n-nodes-base.emailSend'\){nodes[i].disabled=true;process.stdout.write\('Disabled Send Email node\\n'\)}}fs.writeFileSync\(p.join\(h,'n8n_nodes_fixed.json'\),JSON.stringify\(nodes\),'utf-8'\);process.stdout.write\('Saved\\n'\)")

Bash(node -e "var d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{var nodes=JSON.parse\(d.trim\(\)\);var ok=0;var missing=0;for\(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++\){var n=nodes[i];if\(n.type==='n8n-nodes-base.mySql'\){if\(n.credentials&&n.credentials.mySql&&n.credentials.mySql.id\)ok++;else missing++}}process.stdout.write\('MySQL nodes with creds: '+ok+', without: '+missing+'\\n'\);var em=nodes.find\(function\(n\){return n.type==='n8n-nodes-base.emailSend'}\);process.stdout.write\('Email disabled: '+\(em&&em.disabled\)+'\\n'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\);var wf=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('c:\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\Alex Medina\\\\\\\\Desktop\\\\\\\\agentes\\\\\\\\n8n-foronum-news\\\\\\\\workflows\\\\\\\\foronum_news_pipeline.json','utf-8'\)\);var cred={mySql:{id:'ayDTnm75zHVOkDH0',name:'foronum_n8n'}};var f=0;for\(var i=0;i<wf.nodes.length;i++\){if\(wf.nodes[i].type==='n8n-nodes-base.mySql'\){wf.nodes[i].credentials=JSON.parse\(JSON.stringify\(cred\)\);f++}if\(wf.nodes[i].type==='n8n-nodes-base.emailSend'\){wf.nodes[i].disabled=true;delete wf.nodes[i].credentials}}fs.writeFileSync\('c:\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\Alex Medina\\\\\\\\Desktop\\\\\\\\agentes\\\\\\\\n8n-foronum-news\\\\\\\\workflows\\\\\\\\foronum_news_pipeline.json',JSON.stringify\(wf,null,2\),'utf-8'\);process.stdout.write\('Fixed '+f+' nodes in local file\\n'\)")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\);var wf=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('workflows/foronum_news_pipeline.json','utf-8'\)\);var ok=0;var missing=0;for\(var i=0;i<wf.nodes.length;i++\){var n=wf.nodes[i];if\(n.type==='n8n-nodes-base.mySql'\){if\(n.credentials&&n.credentials.mySql&&n.credentials.mySql.id\)ok++;else missing++}}process.stdout.write\('MySQL: '+ok+' OK, '+missing+' missing\\n'\);var em=wf.nodes.find\(function\(n\){return n.type==='n8n-nodes-base.emailSend'}\);process.stdout.write\('Email disabled: '+\(em&&em.disabled\)+', creds: '+JSON.stringify\(em.credentials\)+'\\n'\)")
